## Checklist

### Required
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) — especially **Codebase Patterns**
- [ ] I tested my changes locally in the browser
- [ ] My code modifies existing files (not new standalone scripts)
- [ ] Auth token uses `localStorage.getItem('auth_token')` (snake_case)
- [ ] All user data rendered in HTML uses `escapeHtml()`
- [ ] UI text is in Spanish, code comments in English
- [ ] No fabricated API endpoints — I verified paths against [Swagger UI](https://latanda.online/docs)
- [ ] No `console.log()` left in production code
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or secrets

### If applicable
- [ ] Tested on mobile (responsive)
- [ ] Tested in Chrome + Firefox
- [ ] No console errors
